title: Cashew Beef Sutra
description: A nutty, crispy beef dish slow-cooked to perfection with a jain-friendly twist, perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: Place beef brisket in a pot, cover with water, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, add cashews, sesame seeds, ginger, soy sauce, honey, sesame oil, salt, and pepper. Simmer for 3 hours or until tender.
Preheat oven to 200°C (392°F). Remove beef brisket from liquid, shred into small pieces, set aside.
Drain cashews, place them on a baking sheet, sprinkle with sesame seeds, and bake for 15 minutes or until lightly browned and crispy.
Combine shredded beef with cooked cashews and their cooking juices. Adjust seasoning if needed and serve warm.
